meta.title: YOSIDI CAD - Floor plans with exact measurements, on-site | iPad surveys
meta.description: YOSIDI CAD: create floor plans with exact measurements from your iPad or iPhone. Connect your Bluetooth laser meter, draw on-site, and export to DXF. Back to the office with the finished plan.
meta.og_title: YOSIDI CAD - Floor plans with exact measurements, on-site
meta.og_description: Professional CAD on your iPad and iPhone. Floor plans with exact measurements, right on the job site. Export to DXF or PDF.
meta.twitter_title: YOSIDI CAD - Floor plans with exact measurements, on-site
meta.twitter_description: Professional CAD on your iPad and iPhone. Floor plans with exact measurements, right on the job site. Export to DXF or PDF.

hero.title: Floor plans with exact measurements, on-site
hero.subtitle: From survey to DXF in the same visit — on your iPad and iPhone. Connect your Bluetooth laser meter, draw on-site, and return to the office with the finished plan.

workflow.title: From visit to plan in 3 steps
workflow.subtitle: No paper sketches. No redrawing. No wasted time.

step1.title: Point and draw
step1.description: Connect your laser meter or enter measurements manually. Irregular shapes, out-of-square walls — the plan builds accurately as you work.

step2.title: Calculate areas
step2.description: Areas are calculated automatically. Add dimensions, labels, and all the information the plan needs.

step3.title: Export and continue
step3.description: DXF to continue on your desktop CAD. PDF with professional title block for the client. Done before you leave the site.

mid.title: No pencil, no errors, no wasted time

final.title: Start surveying plans on-site
final.subtitle: Free download. No subscription. No account.
final.note: DXF and PDF export available as in-app purchase

features.title: Everything you need in the field
features.subtitle: Professional CAD tools designed for working outside the office

tools.title: Complete CAD tools
tools.description: Offset, fillet, trim, extend, copy, move, stretch, rotate, measure, and more. Layer system with visibility, color, and line type control.

areas.title: Automatic area calculation
areas.description: Get built, usable, and per-room areas instantly. Place area labels with a single tap.

openings.title: Smart openings
openings.description: Place doors and windows with one tap. Adjust dimensions, swing and type. What takes multiple steps in desktop CAD is just a tap here.

blocks.title: Block library
blocks.description: Furniture, fixtures, appliances, and architectural elements ready to insert into your survey.

formats.title: Formats with title block
formats.description: Standard ISO, ANSI, and Arch formats with customizable title block. Add your logo, project data, and signature.

tutorials.title: Built-in tutorials
tutorials.description: Step-by-step guides inside the app. If you already use CAD, you'll be working in 5 minutes. If not, the tutorials walk you through it.

export.title: DXF and PDF export
export.description: Export to DXF and continue on your desktop CAD. Or generate PDFs with professional title block for the client.

bluetooth.title: Bluetooth laser meters
bluetooth.description: Connect your laser meter via Bluetooth. Every measurement goes straight into the plan — no notes, no typing.

units.title: Metric and imperial
units.description: Work in meters, feet, inches, or fractions. Switch systems at any time without losing precision.

audience.title: Designed for field professionals
audience.subtitle: YOSIDI is the daily work tool of:

architects.title: Architects
architects.description: As-built surveys, renovations and energy certificates. DXF plans ready for the studio.

designers.title: Interior designers
designers.description: Space measurement, furniture layout, and design proposals right at the client's home.

engineers.title: Engineers
engineers.description: Installations, energy certificates, and field documentation with instant export.

appraisers.title: Appraisers and surveyors
appraisers.description: Quick plans with built and usable area calculation. Professional PDF in the same visit.

builders.title: Builders and renovators
builders.description: Document the current state of the site and take the plan with you, error-free. Forget pencil and paper.

trades.title: Installers and trades
trades.description: Measure the client's space and take the plan with you. Kitchens, wardrobes, carpentry, metalwork.

gallery.title: See YOSIDI in action
gallery.subtitle: Clean, professional interface designed for fast work

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is our priority. YOSIDI works 100% offline.

no_data.title: No data collection
no_data.description: YOSIDI does not collect or store any personal information. The app works entirely offline. Your drawings and files are saved only on your device and are never uploaded to any external server.

no_permissions.title: No unnecessary permissions
no_permissions.description: The app does not access your location, contacts, microphone, camera, or any other personal data. It does not require you to create an account or log in.

payments.title: Secure payments
payments.description: All in-app purchases are handled securely by the App Store. We do not store or process any payment information directly.

website.title: Website
website.description: Our website (www.yosidi.com) does not use cookies or third-party analytics services. Your browsing is completely private and anonymous.

privacy.contact: For any questions or concerns, contact us at
privacy.terms_link: Our Terms of Use are available at

footer.tagline: Professional CAD on your iPad and iPhone. Designed by architects.

privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_page.intro: Your privacy is our priority. YOSIDI CAD works 100% offline and does not collect any personal data.

no_data.title: No Data Collection
no_data.description: YOSIDI CAD does not collect, store, or process any personal information. The app works completely offline without an internet connection. Your drawings, files, and settings are saved only on your device and are never uploaded to any external server.

no_permissions.title: No Unnecessary Permissions
no_permissions.description: The app does not access your location, contacts, microphone, camera, photos, or any other personal data. It does not require you to create an account, provide an email address, or log in. You can use YOSIDI CAD completely anonymously.

data_storage.title: Data Storage
data_storage.description: All your drawings and settings are stored locally on your iOS device using the app's local file system. This data remains on your device and only you have access to it. If you uninstall the app, all stored data will be automatically deleted.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.description: All in-app purchases (DXF/PDF exports) are processed securely by Apple through the App Store. We do not store, process, or have access to any payment information such as credit card numbers or banking details. All payment information is managed exclusively by Apple.

bluetooth.title: Bluetooth Laser Measures
bluetooth.description: If you use the Bluetooth laser measure connection feature, the app will request permission to access your device's Bluetooth. This connection is used solely to receive measurements from compatible laser devices. No personal data is transmitted via Bluetooth, and the connection is local between your iPad/iPhone and the laser measure.

website.title: Website
website.description: Our website (www.yosidi.com) does not use cookies or third-party analytics services. Your browsing is completely private and anonymous.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.description: YOSIDI CAD is safe for users of all ages. Since we do not collect any personal information, the app complies with all child protection regulations including COPPA (Children's Online Privacy Protection Act).

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We may update this privacy policy occasionally. Changes will be posted on this page. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy policy, you can contact us at:

terms_page.title: Terms of Use
terms_page.intro: By using YOSIDI CAD, you agree to the following terms and conditions.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By downloading, installing, or using YOSIDI CAD, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with these terms, do not use the app.

license.title: License to Use
license.description: We grant you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to use YOSIDI CAD for personal and professional purposes, subject to these terms. This license does not grant you any rights to the app's source code, design, or intellectual property.

ownership.title: Content Ownership
ownership.description: You retain full ownership and all rights to the drawings, plans, and files you create with YOSIDI CAD. We make no claim to any rights over your content.

as_is.title: App Provided "As Is"
as_is.description: YOSIDI CAD is provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee that the app will be error-free, uninterrupted, or meet specific requirements.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.description: We are not responsible for any data loss, damage, or harm resulting from the use of YOSIDI CAD. It is your responsibility to maintain backups of your important files and drawings.

purchases.title: In-App Purchases
purchases.description: In-app purchases (DXF/PDF export) are securely handled through Apple's App Store and are subject to Apple's terms. All purchases are final and non-refundable, except where required by applicable law.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Uses
prohibited.item1: Reverse engineering, decompiling, or disassembling the app.
prohibited.item2: Distributing, selling, or sublicensing the app without authorization.
prohibited.item3: Using the app for illegal or unauthorized purposes.
prohibited.item4: Attempting to access undocumented or restricted features.
prohibited.item5: Removing or modifying copyright notices or trademarks.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description_part1: By using this app, you also agree to our

updates.title: App Updates
updates.description: We may release periodic updates to YOSIDI CAD to add features, fix bugs, or improve performance. These updates may modify or remove certain features. We are not obligated to provide updates or ongoing support.

termination.title: Termination
termination.description: We may suspend or terminate your access to YOSIDI CAD at any time if you violate these terms. Upon uninstalling the app, this license terminates automatically.

changes.title: Modifications to Terms
changes.description: We may update these Terms of Use occasionally. Changes will be posted on this page. We recommend reviewing these terms periodically.

law.title: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
law.description: These terms are governed by the laws of Spain. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved in the Spanish courts.
